title: Back Market Service Fee charged to customers
bodyHtml: Back Market now applies a Service Fee  to customers on all orders. This fee is charged directly to customers at checkout. This is also called the Back Market Quality Assurance Fee. It aims at financing our work in the quality controls, monitoring of sellers’ performance, and it also supports the Back Market Innovation Lab. You are not responsible for this fee. When an order is refunded, Back Market reimburses the Service Fee directly, not the seller.
